message.content: make a plan about fixing the ui in docs mode. its very ugly. and not alligend to the rest

I'll create a plan for fixing the docs mode UI. First, let me explore the workspace to understand the current state of the docs mode UI implementation.

```bash
ls -la
```

```bash
find . -name "*.md" -o -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.jsx" -o -name "*.vue" 2>/dev/null | head -50
```

```bash
grep -r "docs.*mode" . --include="*.tsx" --include="*.md" 2>/dev/null | head -20
```

```bash
echo "Current cwd: $(pwd)"
```
